arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle United star offered to three PL clubs for €20-25m
arts.sum: Newcastle United midfielder Miguel Almiron can leave the club in this January’s transfer window, with a number of clubs offered the player. CaughtOffside understands that Newcastle want around €20-25m for the Paraguay international who has a number of options on the table for him this winter. Almiron has been offered to Crystal Palace, Leicester City […] The post Exclusive: Newcastle United star offered to three PL clubs for €20-25m appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: PIF secure £5.6bn investment deal as Newcastle United target 65,000 St James' Park rebuild

arts.sum: Tuesday sees us tackle Newcastle United in a Carabao Cup semi-final showdown at Emirates Stadium (8pm UK), as we aim to take a first-leg advantage up to the north-east next month. This competition has been a fruitful one for the Geordies in recent years, who have lost just one of their last 15 League Cup matches - the 2023 final when they were beaten by United.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news with Kai Havertz update amid Ethan Nwaneri concern
arts.sum: Arsenal star Ethan Nwaneri is set for spell on the side-lines after Mikel Arteta confirmed that the young midfielder has suffered an injury setback. "I hope so, but I don't want to say yes because last time I said he [Havertz] was going to be fit and he wasn't," said Arteta when asked if he expects Havertz to be available for Tuesday night's clash at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: I hung up and left my Newcastle United pals in tears after they called me a 'flash Cockney'
arts.sum: Bromley boss Andy Woodman left his former Newcastle United colleagues 'in tears' after falling victim to a prank call ahead of Sunday's FA Cup clash. “They are battering me and I’m going, ‘Richie, Richie, it’s Woody,’ but I realise I’ve got this wrong.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops major Alexander Isak hint as Arsenal dealt huge blow before Newcastle
arts.sum: Arteta was asked on Monday about the prospect of facing Isak and an in-form Newcastle in the Carabao Cup. Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has hinted at the club's plan to stop Alexander Isak when they face Newcastle United .

arts.ttl: 'Watch out': Rio Ferdinand says there's another young gem at Arsenal who Arteta has never used yet
arts.sum: Arteta hasn't given him his debut yet...

arts.ttl: Potential Carabao Cup winners ranked as Arsenal, Liverpool, Newcastle and Spurs face off
arts.sum: Arsenal, Liverpool, Newcastle and Tottenham face off over the coming week in the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup with some clubs out to end long trophy droughts with victory, but who wants it more?

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Newcastle, Ethan Nwaneri injury, transfers and referees
arts.sum: It starts tomorrow, two legs and it’s obviously going to be two long games against a very competitive team. Arteta was hurt further by the injuries to more players and confirmation that the illness remains a problem with the team.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers’ pop at Celtic punters was unnecessary and the Kieran Tierney chant has been lost in translation
arts.sum: Hoops supporters were left stunned after getting a major telling off from the boss who had a real bee in his bonnet on Sunday
